heading: Period covered by returns or other documents
label: 6101 Period covered by returns or other documents
text: When not otherwise provided for by this title, the Secretary may by regulations prescribe the period for which, or the date as of which, any return, statement, or other document required by this title or by regulations, shall be made.
notes: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
amendments: Amendments1976— struck out “or his delegate” after “Secretary”.Pub. L. 94–455
